segments.text: Foresight ain't much, but we need something to have the anvil again.
I just remembered the name, Photon Edge. Photon Edge is the side B.
Oh, Photon Edge, there we go.

full_text: Foresight ain't much, but we need something to have the anvil again. I just remembered the name, Photon Edge. Photon Edge is the side B. Oh, Photon Edge, there we go.
